serverInfo.name: swiper-mcp-server
serverInfo.title: Swiper MCP Server
serverInfo.description: Model Context Protocol server for Swiper API documentation, demos, and code examples. Provides programmatic access to Swiper options, methods, events, modules, and framework-specific demo code.

tools.name: search-api
tools.description: Search Swiper API documentation for options, methods, or events.

tools.name: get-option
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Swiper option by name.

tools.name: get-method
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Swiper method by name.

tools.name: get-event
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Swiper event by name.

tools.name: get-demo
tools.description: Get demo code for a specific Swiper demo in a chosen framework (core, element, react, vue, etc.).

tools.name: list-demos
tools.description: List all available Swiper demos with slugs, titles, folders, and supported frameworks.

tools.name: get-module-options
tools.description: Get all options, methods, and events for a specific Swiper module.

tools.name: get-premium-recommendations
tools.description: Get premium Swiper plugin recommendations based on effect, module, keywords, or use case.
